Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Jai Daishou]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 2''' — Jai Daishou values propriety as the highest virtue.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 8''' — Jai Daishou is the seventh Underlord of the Blackflame Empire and the Patriarch of the Jai clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 8''' — Jai Daishou is the Patriarch of the third-ranked of the three great clans.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 8''' — Jai Daishou is an Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 17''' — Jai Daishou was involved in a fight between Underlords.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 17''' — Jai Daishou is the Patriarch of the Jai clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Jai Daishou is a member of the Jai clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 20''' — Jai Daishou is a Truegold elder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 20''' — Jai Daishou uses the Star Lance technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 20''' — Jai Daishou uses the Fall of Seven Stars technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 20''' — Jai Daishou uses the Ancestor's Spear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 20''' — Jai Daishou uses Flowing Starlight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 20''' — Jai Daishou uses an Enforcer technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 20''' — Jai Daishou uses a Forger technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 22''' — Renfei planned to take Jai Daishou’s testimony.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 1''' — Jai Daishou has white metal strands for hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 1''' — Jai Daishou is dying.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 4''' — Jai Daishou possesses the Goldsign of the Path of the Stellar Spear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 5''' — Jai Daishou's face turned red and his lips were speckled with blood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — Jai Daishou is a Jai Underlord whose spirit has been permanently damaged.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — Jai Daishou used a Striker technique that blasted through stone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — Jai Daishou's death resulted in the manifestation of an Underlord's Remnant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — Jai Daishou drew power from the Archstone until his soul's foundation was eroded.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 7''' — Jai Daishou's involvement changed the situation involving Jai Long.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon believes Eithan could have finished Jai Daishou immediately.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 7''' — Jai Daishou opened an entrance to the labyrinth in his territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 9''' — Jai Daishou released a rush of unstable madra that swollen Jai Chen's core.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 11''' — Jai Daishou retrieved the Archstone from a western labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — Jai Daishou is dead.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 6''' — Jai Daishou once helped attack the city of Serpent’s Grave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 6''' — Jai Daishou ran Jai Long through personal trials.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — Jai Daishou used a Divine Treasure to fake his death.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
